I'm sorry, WHAT??? WE'RE TRUSTING THEM TO SELF ISOLATE?  

I'm sorry, no, but this is like the one thing that'll turn this anarchist full tanky. Lock them down. Give them chocolates or like pickled socks or whatever they eat over there to keep them happy and comfortable but no no no we are not going to trust them to isolate themselves. We're not doing this again. 

#hantavirus
